      1. Staffordshire Moorlands District Council
      2. Residents
      3. Bins and recycling

      Find your bin day

      To find your bin day, just enter your postcode and select your address from the list

      Please ensure your bin is presented at your bin collection point by 6am on the collection day shown.

      Brown bin collections are currently unavailable in the 'Find Your Bin Day' calendar due to essential upgrade work. Please continue to put your bin out on your usual collection day.

      If you need further help with this, please contact Bins and Recycling using the form below.

      Contact Bins and Recycling
